'''Regulgo''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|90|Regulgo}}</ref> located in the [[Regulgo system/Legends|Regulgo system]],<ref name="Fry" /> a part of the [[Ryndellian sector/Legends|Ryndellian sector]] within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC" /> and [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] regions.<ref name="TEA" /> [[Standard month/Legends|Months]] after [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] departed [[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]]<ref name="DNI">''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''</ref> in approximately [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures|''The Han Solo Adventures'']] novel trilogy to the [[Time/Legends|time]] interval between [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. Since [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] departure from [[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]] is depicted at the very beginning of the trilogy's second novel, ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'', it can therefore be placed in approximately 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].</ref> [[Kamarian]]s tracked [[Gender/Legends|him]] down on Regulgo.<ref name="DNII">''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''</ref> While there, the Kamarians attacked Solo<ref name="CSWE" /> and took him captive; however, Solo eventually escaped.<ref name="DNI" />

==Behind the scenes==
Regulgo was first mentioned in the [[2005]] novel ''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'', written by [[Troy Denning]].<ref name="DNII" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Regulgo [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Regulgo, within grid square P-17.<ref name="TEA" />
